3183170.name: Planet Gemini
3183170.description:
Planet Gemini is a factory building and tower defense game. On two planets that crash-landed during a dimension trip, survive against incoming enemies and research on a portal to escape.

FEATURES

  • Two Planets: Teleporting two planets that have different resources and building a base to defense enemies.

  • Co-Op: It's not easy to manage two planets on your own. Play with your friends and challenge harder difficulties.

  • Factory Automation: Gather resources and research technology to build more efficient automation facilities

  • Tower Defense: Build a defense line with the resources that you produced and complete the portal study successfully
